query:
ALTER TABLE `breakoutScans`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `signalType` ENUM('BREAKOUT','RETEST') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BREAKOUT',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `breakoutLevel` DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `currentPrice` DOUBLE DEFAULT 0;
